chiefOfStaffPrompts.prompt: Research expansion signals across strategic accounts and draft a growth plan with risks and next steps.
Prepare the cash runway bridge from the finance notes and flag decisions needed before the board update.
Review the vendor agreement comments and summarize the positions, open risks, and approval questions.
Build the launch readiness checklist from messages, owners, and unresolved operational blockers.
Summarize the incident follow-up from the engineering thread and produce the owner/action list.
Prepare tomorrow's interview brief with candidate context, scorecard notes, and open follow-ups.
Draft renewal follow-ups for the customer escalations and separate what needs approval before sending.
Compare competitor launch claims with security questionnaire evidence and brief me on gaps.
